_meta.description: D6 fixtures for langgraph-python / gen-ui-declarative (A2UI Dynamic Schema)
_meta._note: Agent plays a sales analyst for the fictional Vantage Threads company (OSS-136). Two-stage A2UI pattern: (1) outer agent has only one tool, `generate_a2ui` (no args); (2) `generate_a2ui` internally invokes a secondary LLM with tool_choice forced on the design tool, which emits the flat A2UI components payload; (3) after the tool returns, the outer agent emits a one-sentence narration. Fixtures cover three LLM calls per pill: (a) outer turn 1 -> generate_a2ui toolcall; (b) inner secondary call -> design toolcall (discriminated by toolName because the user prompt is identical across outer+inner calls); (c) outer turn 2 (matched by toolCallId) -> narration. Pill prompts are natural business questions; chart steering lives in the system prompt + sales-context.ts context entries. Keep userMessage matchers in sync with declarative-gen-ui/suggestions.ts and harness d5-gen-ui-declarative.ts.

fixtures._comment: pill sales-dashboard hero — inner secondary LLM (tool_choice forced) emits the flat A2UI components. Discriminated by toolName so it wins over the outer generate_a2ui fixture whose userMessage matches the same prompt.

toolCalls.name: _design_a2ui_surface
toolCalls.arguments: {"surfaceId":"sales-dashboard","catalogId":"declarative-gen-ui-catalog","components":[{"id":"root","component":"Card","title":"Q2 Sales Dashboard","subtitle":"Vantage Threads \u2014 quarter to date","child":"dash-col"},{"id":"dash-col","component":"Column","gap":16,"children":["kpi-row","charts-row"]},{"id":"kpi-row","component":"Row","gap":16,"children":["m-rev","m-cust","m-win","m-deal"]},{"id":"m-rev","component":"Metric","label":"Revenue","value":"$4.2M","trend":"up","trendValue":"12% QoQ"},{"id":"m-cust","component":"Metric","label":"New Customers","value":"186","trend":"up","trendValue":"8%"},{"id":"m-win","component":"Metric","label":"Win Rate","value":"31%","trend":"down","trendValue":"2 pts"},{"id":"m-deal","component":"Metric","label":"Avg Deal Size","value":"$22.6k","trend":"up","trendValue":"5%"},{"id":"charts-row","component":"Row","gap":16,"children":["pie-region","bar-monthly"]},{"id":"pie-region","component":"PieChart","title":"Revenue by Region","description":"Q2 revenue split","data":[{"label":"North America","value":1900000},{"label":"EMEA","value":1300000},{"label":"APAC","value":720000},{"label":"LATAM","value":280000}]},{"id":"bar-monthly","component":"BarChart","title":"Monthly Revenue","description":"January through June","data":[{"label":"Jan","value":1210000},{"label":"Feb","value":1340000},{"label":"Mar","value":1650000},{"label":"Apr","value":1380000},{"label":"May","value":1420000},{"label":"Jun","value":1400000}]}]}

fixtures._comment: pill sales-dashboard hero — outer agent narration after generate_a2ui returns.
pill sales-dashboard hero — outer agent emits generate_a2ui (no args).

pill team-performance — inner secondary LLM (tool_choice forced) emits the flat A2UI components. Discriminated by toolName so it wins over the outer generate_a2ui fixture whose userMessage matches the same prompt.
pill team-performance — outer agent narration after generate_a2ui returns.

response.content: Here's how the team is tracking against quota.
